raw.subject: Your Florence page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you have a knack for creating a welcoming atmosphere in your mobile pet grooming business. The way you highlight the services and care you provide in Florence, Hartsville, and Darlington areas on Facebook is really engaging.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet. As a mobile business, you might be missing out on bookings and calls from potential clients who prefer to research and book online.

I sketched out a homepage idea based on the photos and posts you share on Facebook. It includes a section on your grooming services, a photo gallery showcasing your work, and a clear call-to-action to book an appointment.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/holly-s-pooch-pawlor-florence

It's a straightforward project to build out a site like this, with a flat fee for local businesses. If you'd like to get a quote or discuss further, feel free to reply or give me a quick call.
